SELECT to_timestamp(1284352323.5) AS ts_example, to_timestamp(0.0) AS ts_epoch, to_timestamp(-1.0) AS ts_negative, to_timestamp(2147483647.0) AS ts_max_pos, to_timestamp(-2147483648.0) AS ts_max_neg FROM timestamps;

SELECT t.epoch_seconds, to_timestamp(t.epoch_seconds) AS converted_ts, e.extra_epoch, to_timestamp(e.extra_epoch) AS extra_converted_ts FROM timestamps t JOIN extra_timestamps e ON t.epoch_seconds = e.extra_epoch;

WITH date_values AS (SELECT 1284352323.5 AS seconds, 0 AS seconds_zero, -1 AS seconds_negative UNION ALL SELECT 2147483647.0, -2147483648.0, NULL) SELECT to_timestamp(seconds) AS valid_ts, to_timestamp(seconds_zero) AS zero_ts, to_timestamp(seconds_negative) AS negative_ts FROM date_values;
SELECT COUNT(*), to_timestamp(seq) FROM (SELECT GENERATE_SERIES(0.0, 10.0, 1.0) AS seq) AS generated_timestamps GROUP BY seq;
SELECT to_timestamp(s) FROM (SELECT AVG(epoch_seconds) AS s FROM timestamps) AS avg_ts;
